name: Awakener (RPG) v2
description:
Welcome to Awakened Earth, a world fractured by dimensional Gates and teeming with Awakeners, Hunters, and Monsters. Choose your path—be a Hero, a Villain, a God in disguise, or even a Monster reborn. With a dynamic job-class system, Gacha powers, and branching storylines shaped by your choices, your journey will span Guild Wars, Monster Monarchies, and the secrets of the Gates themselves.

🎮 Features:

  • 🏙️ Choose your starting city

  • 🧬 Begin as a Hunter, Civilian, System Holder, or Monster

  • 🎲 Roll for powers with Gacha mechanics

  • 🧟‍♂️ Trigger Monster Paths with transformation events

  • 🧩 Solve dungeon mysteries, form Guilds or Cults, romance NPCs, and challenge fate itself
creator: demonsdie
